evals.prompt: Summarize the purpose of the Opquast framework in web projects.
evals.expected_output: References the 245-rule quality framework across disciplines.

evals.prompt: List categories Opquast can help cover in audits.
evals.expected_output: Includes accessibility, security, privacy, and content quality.

evals.prompt: How should teams operationalize Opquast in delivery workflows?
evals.expected_output: Use checklist-driven QA gates and recurring audits.
